---
title: "Homework 1"
author: Jane Doe
format: html
---

```{r setup}
library(here)
```

## Task 1 - Implementation

Replace this text with a short write up describing your approach.

```{r fizzbuzz}
fizzbuzz = function(v) {
  if (!is.numeric(v))
    cli::cli_abort("Input must be numeric, not {.cls {class(v)}}.")
  if (any(!is.finite(v)))
    cli::cli_abort("All values must be finite and non-missing.")
  if (any(v < 0))
    cli::cli_abort("All values must be non-negative.")
  if (any(v != trunc(v)))
    cli::cli_abort("All values must be whole numbers.")

  for (x in v) {
    if (x %% 15 == 0) {
      print("FizzBuzz")
    } else if (x %% 3 == 0) {
      print("Fizz")
    } else if (x %% 5 == 0) {
      print("Buzz")
    } else {
      print(x)
    }
  }
}
```

## Task 2 - Validation

### Good inputs

```{r}
fizzbuzz(1)
fizzbuzz(3)
fizzbuzz(5)
fizzbuzz(15)
fizzbuzz(1:15)
```

### Bad inputs

```{r, error=TRUE}
fizzbuzz(-1)
fizzbuzz(1.5)
fizzbuzz(Inf)
fizzbuzz("A")
```
